feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Guideline for Creating Down Payment Request for Asset
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

For processing a down payment request related to asset procurement, the request needs to be generated through the "Verify Down Payment Request" app in SAP.

To assist with this process, I would like to request a guideline outlining the required steps to create a down payment request for an asset using this application. A step-by-step instruction would be highly appreciated so that we can follow the correct procedure in the system.

entry.title: The Bill Note document number is not running according to the fiscal year.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask about the document numbering.
I currently use the "Manage Payment Receipt – Thailand" app to print the Bill Note document for customers.

However, the External ID number is not reset after the new year.
The Manage Payment Receipt – Thailand app continues running the External ID number from the previous year instead of restarting for the new year.

Please advise if there is any configuration that allows the External ID to reset by fiscal year.

Best regards,

May

entry.title: Post goods receipt referenced to "pending truck cargo e-bill"?
entry.content:
Hi community!

Can you help me with the following situation?

My customer loads its own trucks (set up as mobile storages) with gas and they immediately have to start selling the product (house by house). However the gas vendor takes some time to send the electronic truck Cargo Bill to headquarters. So I actually have a loaded truck (and I want to sell from there) but SAP has no stock since GR is missing until somebody posts the GR (after administration sends the Cargo Bill).  I would like the truck drivers to inform the received cargo manually so somebody can enter a manual GR against a "future reception of electronic cargo bill". When i receive the E-bill SAP verifies stated quantities. Does this make sense? Is there a standard movement to use instead / before 101 for GR?

Thank you! G.

entry.title: Depreciation Key for Intangible Assets (No 50% reduction in the first year)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation for an Italian company and I am facing a localization issue regarding Asset Accounting.

My client raised a specific requirement regarding the depreciation of Intangible Assets (e.g., software, licenses, patents). According to Italian tax law, intangible assets should be depreciated without the 50% reduction in the first year of acquisition, which is instead mandatory for tangible assets.

Currently, the standard depreciation keys provided for Italy (such as the "I**" series) seem to apply the 50% reduction (half-year convention) in the first year by default.

Since we are on Public Cloud and we do not have full access to create or deeply modify depreciation keys and period controls from scratch (like we used to do via AFAMA in On-Premise), my questions are:

  1. Is there a specific standard SAP Depreciation Key for Italy designed explicitly for Intangible Assets that calculates the full quota without the 50% first-year reduction?

  2. If not, what is the best practice or the specific SSCUI / Configuration Activity to adjust the period control method to meet this Italian legal requirement?

Thanks in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Andrea

entry.title: Sales quotation remains open even when delivered and invoiced
entry.content:
We have noticed that some quotations have the status “open” even though there is an order, goods issue, and an invoice associated with them.

The reference status is also not updated.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Released CDS View for Sales Price Condition Records with Material ID, in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

System : SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

We are building an external OData API in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
Our goal is to merge Sales Pricing data with Inventory (Material Stock)
data into a single API for downstream consumption.

GOAL:
Expose a combined Stock + Sales Price API by joining:
- I_MaterialStock_2 (inventory/stock levels per plant & storage location)
- A Sales Price CDS view (with Material ID as the join key)

PROBLEM:
The only relevant released CDS view we found is I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord
— but it does NOT include the Material / Product field.
Without Material ID, we cannot join pricing data with stock data
at the material level.

ALREADY CHECKED:
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord — no Material ID field
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecordValidity — Material ID not consistently exposed
- SAP API Business Hub (api.sap.com) — no suitable released OData service found
- SAP Help Portal and SAP Notes — no workaround found

DESIRED API DATA MODEL (illustrative):

SELECT
s.Material,
s.Plant,
s.StorageLocation,
s.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit AS StockQuantity,
p.ConditionRateValue AS SalesPrice,
p.TransactionCurrency,
p.ConditionValidityEndDate
FROM I_MaterialStock_2 AS s
JOIN <Missing Sales Price CDS> AS p ON s.Material = p.Material

REQUIRED FIELDS from the missing Sales Price CDS view:
- Material / Product (mandatory join key)
- ConditionType (e.g. PR00)
- ConditionRateValue (price amount)
- TransactionCurrency
- SalesOrganization / DistributionChannel (for filtering)
- ConditionValidityStartDate / ConditionValidityEndDate

QUESTIONS:
1. Does a released CDS view exist that exposes Sales Price
Condition Records WITH Material ID?
2. If not, is SAP planning to release one  and when?
3. What is the SAP-recommended approach to join I_MaterialStock_2
with Sales Price data for an external-facing OData API?
4. If a custom approach is needed, is RAP/BTP extensibility
the right pattern within S/4HANA Cloud boundaries?

We have exhausted all self-service options before posting here.
Any guidance from the community or SAP experts is greatly appreciated!

Thank you.

Rudhra

entry.title: Workflow for Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hello, 

In the Manage Workflows for PR app, is it possible to make an approval workflow involving the amount, G/L account, and cost center?

The only options available are amount, company code, document type.
Thanks

entry.title: Unable to change movement type in Freight Order Booking for Ocean - S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community experts,

I'm experiencing an issue with Freight Order Booking for Ocean shipments in export scenarios. The shipment stages are not updating accordingly.

The scenario operates under multiple Incoterms, including CIF and FOB. However, I’m unable to trigger the correct movement type (e.g., Door-to-Port) based on the Incoterm in order to generate the required stages, specifically pre-carriage and main carriage.

We are receiving the error: Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171. Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.

1. I entered the Incoterm FOB in the sales order, expecting it to trigger the Door-to-Port movement type so that the stages would appear as pre-carriage and main carriage only. However, this did not happen. Additionally, I was not able to select any of the available ports created in the Manage Location app in the Inco. Location 1 field on the Sales tab.

The question is what are the configurations involved and steps needed to achieve each expected movement type from the incoterms selected?

entry.title: How to enable auto -reversing function for the manual journal
entry.content: Is there any functions available in SAP S4 Hana Cloud(Public Edition). For Example: accrual entries, or any entries posted in the current month that need to be reversed in the subsequent month, can be handled through this function. With it, the system will automatically reverse the journal entry in the following month based on the reversal date and document type specified at the time of posting. Currently, users must manually reverse each entry one by one with low efficiency.  Is there any solution for that?

entry.title: Customer Down Payment in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am working on SAP S/4 HANA public cloud, I want to directly post customer/ vendor down payment without creating prior down payment request. How is it possible to directly use special GL indicator (A) in public cloud.

Is this possible?

BR

Muhammad Yousuf Ali

SAP FICO Consultant

entry.title: how to know open posting period by CDS view or API
entry.content:
Hello, experts.

I'd like to know whether a posting period in SAP is open or closed from another system, not through the SAP manage posting period application, but through a CDS view or API communication.

My additional request is for data from the FI posting period (OB52), not the logistics period (MMPV).
I've already checked the CDS view “I_CompanyCodePeriod”, but I couldn't find the accounting document posting period I'm looking for. ("I_CompanyCodePeriod" doesn't even allow you to check whether posting to previous years is possible.)

If not through a CDS view, is there a way to check this using an API? SAP Public Edition doesn't even allow for the creation of parked accounting documents, so the Journal Entry - Post API isn't available.

It makes no sense to post actual documents to the production environment every time I query to determine the accounting period.

“C_OpenPostingPeriod” or “I_OpenPostingPeriod” seem to be the most suitable data model for what I'm looking for.

Please help me.
Thank you.

entry.title: Calculation formula of Run Accrual/Deferral for CP
entry.content:
Could you tell us the calculation formula of Run Accrual/Deferral for CP?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Released API for F-07 / FB01 / F-44 equivalent posting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently migrating a custom ECC ABAP report (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) framework as
a Managed Business Object with Draft.

In ECC, the report posted FI entries using BDC recordings for the following
transactions:

- F-06 → Incoming Customer Payment
- F-07 → Outgoing Vendor Payment
- FB01 → Manual GL Document Posting
- F-44 → Vendor Special GL Clearing (Indicator K)

Since BDC is NOT permitted in Public Cloud, I have been searching for the
equivalent released APIs.


✅ RESOLVED — F-06:
I found and implemented CCPAPI_CUSTOMER_PAYMENT_SRV (Communication Scenario
SAP_COM_0276) via OData HTTP POST. This works correctly.


❌ STILL BLOCKED — F-07, FB01, F-44:

► F-07 (Outgoing Payment):
- API_PAYMENT_INITIATION_SRV → Scope mismatch. Covers payment orders,
not direct FI document posting
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Error: "The operation CREATE is not activated
for entity I_JOURNALENTRYTP"

► FB01 (Manual GL Posting):
- Same BAPI blocked as above
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Same CREATE not activated error
- No generic GL document posting API found on SAP API Business Hub

► F-44 (Vendor Special GL Clearing):
- I_JournalEntryTP EML with SpecialGLIndicator field → Same CREATE
not activated error
- Factoring Clearing SOAP API → FI-CA module only, not applicable for FI-AP
- No AP account clearing API found


My Questions:
─────────────
1. What is the correct released API / RAP Business Object to post an
outgoing payment (F-07 equivalent) in Public Cloud?

2. What is the correct API for posting a manual GL document (FB01 equivalent)
programmatically from a RAP behavior class?

3. What is the correct API for clearing a vendor special GL indicator K item
(F-44 equivalent)?

4. Is I_JournalEntryTP the correct Business Object for all of these? If yes,
why is the CREATE operation not activated and how can it be enabled?

5. Is there a Communication Scenario that needs to be set up for
I_JournalEntryTP to work via EML?


Technical Context:
──────────────────
- Development: RAP Managed BO, ABAP for Cloud (Tier 1)
- Root BO: ZI_FI_BRS_STATEMENT (based on I_JournalEntryItem)
- Action: PostBRSItems inside behavior class zbp_i_fi_brs_statement
- System: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- Already tried: MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_JournalEntryTP with COMMIT ENTITIES

Any guidance, SAP Notes, KBA references, or working code examples would be
greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Error in Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction when uploading file
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

We would like to start using the app "Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction"

When checking Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction, the app is available. When uploading a PDF however, we receive the error 'Ask administrator to check model activation in intelligent scenario'. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Urgent: Process to Delete Uploaded Bank Statement
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please share the process to delete an uploaded bank statement in the system?

Kindly treat this as urgent and provide the necessary guidance at the earliest.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Custom CDS Views / Analytical Queries Not Visible in SAC Live Connection via SAP_COM_0065
entry.content:
I successfully set up a Live Data Connection between SAC and S/4HANA Public Cloud using OAuth authentication via communication scenario SAP_COM_0065. The connection is validated and working — when browsing sources in SAC, I can see approximately 100 standard SAP queries (e.g. 2CCENGPTEBILLITMQ and similar standard delivered queries).

However, my custom developments are completely invisible in SAC. Specifically:

  • Custom CDS views of type Analytical Cube that I created in the Custom CDS Views app do not appear as available sources in SAC.
  • Custom Analytical Queries that I created on top of both my custom cubes and SAP-delivered released cubes (published with green status) are also not showing up in SAC.
  • Only SAP standard delivered queries that are pre-registered to SAP_COM_0065 are visible.

entry.title: EBS - Processing Rules overlap | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Good morning,

we are trying to set up EBS automatic Processing Rules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. Specifically, we are trying to create some "generic" rules base on the following conditions: company code, external transaction, house bank and house bank account.

However, we would like to add some more "specific" rules: so, for the same company code, external transaction, house bank and house bank account, we are considering to add the "contains" condition to the Memo Line attribute. This "specifc" rule will write in a different G/L.

Unfortunately, there will be an overlap between the "generic" rule and both of them may be satisfied: so, the system will not apply any of those rules (SAP note 3623221).

It seems that the only option is using "does not contain" condition for Memo Line attribute in the "generic" rule, but this will be diffcult to be managed when the number of keywords/"specific" rules increases.

Are there any options to manage this situation?

Thank you

entry.title: Resource Handover for Product WTs in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

I would like to ask for your help and technical guidance on how to manage a resource handover within a single 2-step Product Warehouse Task (Replenishment) in S/4HANA Cloud, public edition.

Process Facts:

  • Context: EWM Stock Replenishment between two buildings.
  • Execution: Due to the physical distance, the process is split between two employees. Resource A performs the source confirmation (picking) in Building 1. Resource B performs the destination confirmation (putaway) in Building 2.
  • System Environment: Product-based WTs (no HUs used). Layout-Oriented Storage Control (LOSC) is not implemented.
  • Current Issue: After Resource A confirms the source data, the Warehouse Order remains assigned to Resource A. When Resource B attempts to confirm the destination, the system prevents it (Error /SCWM/RF_EN140).

Questions:

  1. What is the standard procedure to release the resource assignment after the first step (source confirmation) so a second resource can take over and confirm the destination? (I have even tried in Warehouse Monitor to unassign the old resource and then assign a new one, but it still says that the old res. is processing the task)
  2. Is there a standard Exception Code available in Public Cloud to trigger this handover for Product WTs?
  3. How can the "Stock on Resource" be transferred from Resource A to Resource B within the same Warehouse Task?

Best regards,

Adam Toth

entry.title: How to exclude Employee BPs from the Dual Control Process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
How to exclude Employee BPs from the Dual Control Process (Confirmation of Change) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Internal credit/debt for credit or debit memo requests
entry.content:
Dear All,

we are facing a problem with intercompany invoicing between Germany and Italy in the public cloud system of our customer.
For the normal sales and returns process there is no problem, we create the internal invoice/credit after the customer invoice/credit and everything is ok.

But sometimes there are special processes that need to be invoiced internally to Italy.
For example Good will credit notes. Customer complains about goods and we just give him a credit without a physical return. Or the other case, customer got more goods than invoiced, in that case we just write a debit note without physical goods.

The standard best practice for these cases just sends the credit or debit note via IDOC to the receiving company. But this does not create an internal invoice/credit and our customer insists on having one the same as we have it in the normal sales and returns process.

Any suggestions how to solve this? I was thinking about creating the credit or debit manually, but this causes a lot of work.

Thanks for your insights
Martina
